critical.mandate: Output must be optimized for AI agent consumption

step.title: Scan Project
step.action: Read key files: package.json, README, config files

step.title: Distill Context
step.action: Extract: project name, tech stack, conventions, file structure

step.title: Generate AI Rules
step.action: Create rules file optimized for AI agent consumption
Include: do/don't rules, file patterns, conventions

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate project context document optimized for AI agents with: project overview, tech stack, conventions, do/don't rules, key file patterns.
